entries.schemaImpact: Adds wallet-bound non-anonymous player Auth identities, private Supabase Realtime membership authorization, exact topic RLS, and authorization audit storage
entries.dataImpact: Seeds only a local-safe environment setting; no membership, presence, movement, or fake production data
entries.reversibility: Keep the custom provider selected, revoke the four Realtime policies by forward fix, and retain membership audit evidence
entries.hostedValidation: Pending owner-approved starville-dev player-Auth exchange and private-channel configuration validation
entries.productionReadiness: Phase 13E parity incomplete; production remains custom and /ready remains blocked for Supabase mode
entries.knownLimitations: Presence and movement are the only migrated browser slice; all authoritative gameplay remains outside Broadcast.

entries.schemaImpact: Grants authenticated the exact helper EXECUTE privilege required by the four private realtime.messages policies; no table or broad schema function privileges are added
entries.dataImpact: None
